rationale: Implementation cleanly satisfies every AC item: the new test exercises concurrent production across 4 producers into a 3-partition topic, tags each message with `(producer_id, key, seq)`, then explicitly asserts both strictly-increasing per-partition offsets and monotonic per-`(producer_id, key)` sequences. Nice additional guards (single-partition-per-key sanity check, at-least-two-partitions-covered, start/end sequence bounds) strengthen the test without exceeding scope.
